activities_projects.title: Discussion on Magical Objects
steps: Discuss with your partner about a magical object you would like to have
Explain why you would choose that magical object
Share your ideas with the class
Write your answer in your notebook
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop imagination and express their ideas clearly
activities_projects.evaluation: Creativity and participation in discussion (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Magic Paintbrush Imagination Activity
steps: Imagine you have a magic paintbrush like Gopi
Think about what you would draw for yourself
Decide whether you would draw something for others
Write your ideas and explain your reasons
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand how imagination can be used for helping others
activities_projects.evaluation: Clarity of ideas and creativity (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Acts of Kindness Discussion
activities_projects.objective: Understand the value of kindness and helping others
steps: Discuss acts of kindness you have seen or heard about
Share personal experiences or stories
Explain how kindness helps people in society
Write a short paragraph about one act of kindness
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop empathy and moral understanding
activities_projects.evaluation: Quality of ideas and examples shared (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Vocabulary Categorization Activity
activities_projects.objective: Improve vocabulary and understanding of word meanings
steps: Read the given words such as paintbrush, joy, fortress, feast, fear
Understand their meanings
Group them into categories like things, actions, and emotions
Write the categorized words in your notebook
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students improve vocabulary and classification skills

activities_projects.title: Sequence the Events
activities_projects.objective: Understand the storyline and sequence of events
steps: Read the poem carefully
Identify important events in the story
Arrange the events in the correct order
Discuss the sequence with classmates
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students improve comprehension and sequencing skills

activities_projects.title: Tone Identification Activity
steps: Read different parts of the poem
Identify the tone such as playful, suspenseful, or celebratory
Write examples from the poem that show these tones
Discuss your answers with the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand how tone changes in storytelling

activities_projects.title: Symbolism in the Poem
steps: Read phrases like 'magic paintbrush', 'grand fortress', and 'river'
Discuss what these symbols represent
Match the phrases with their symbolic meanings
Write your answers in the notebook
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand symbolism and deeper meanings in poetry

activities_projects.title: Character Analysis of Gopi
activities_projects.objective: Understand character traits and moral values
steps: Read the poem carefully
List the qualities of Gopi
Give examples showing her kindness and courage
Share your analysis with classmates
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand moral values such as kindness and bravery
activities_projects.evaluation: Clarity of explanation and examples (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Role Play – Gopi and the Zamindar
steps: Form groups and assign roles like Gopi, Zamindar, and villagers
Recreate the scene where the Zamindar demands treasures
Act out the escape scene with the magic brush
Perform in front of the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students improve confidence, communication, and understanding of the poem

activities_projects.title: Creative Drawing – Design a Magical Object
steps: Imagine a magical object you would like to create
Draw the object on a sheet
Write about its special powers
Display your drawing in the classroom
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop creativity and artistic expression
